---
title: People

output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
---

<style>
.people-grid {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 24px;
}

.team-card {
  width: calc(33.333% - 16px);
  text-align: center;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.partner-card {
  width: calc(50% - 12px);
  box-sizing: border-box;
  text-align: left;
}

.team-card img,
.partner-card img {
  max-width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.team-card img {
  max-height: 220px;
}

.partner-card img {
  max-height: 140px;
  display: block;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.partner-card p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .team-card {
    width: calc(50% - 12px);
  }

  .partner-card {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .team-card,
  .partner-card {
    width: 100%;
  }
}
</style>

## Team

<div class="people-grid">

<div class="team-card">
<img src="pictures/justinyang.png" alt="Headshot of Justin C Yang">
<br><b>Dr Justin Yang</b>
<br>Senior Research Fellow
<br><a href="https://profiles.ucl.ac.uk/75514-justin-yang">Profile</a>
</div>

<div class="team-card">
<img src="pictures/nathalierich.png" alt="Headshot of Nathalie Rich">
<br><b>Dr Nathalie Rich</b>
<br>Research Fellow (2025-)
<br><a href="https://profiles.ucl.ac.uk/80231-nathalie-rich">Profile</a>
</div>

<div class="team-card">
<img src="pictures/yunsookim.png" alt="Headshot of Yunsoo Kim">
<br><b>Yunsoo Kim</b>
<br>Research Assistant (2026-)
<br><a href="https://bluesky333.github.io/">Website</a>
</div>

</div>

## Community Partners

<div class="people-grid">

<div class="partner-card">
<img src="pictures/changegrowlive.png" alt="Change Grow Live Logo">
<p><b>Change, Grow, Live</b> provides a range of services to support individuals, families and communities whose lives are adversely affected by crime, substance misuse, homelessness, anti-social behaviour, domestic violence, social deprivation and lack of opportunity. The charity works with challenging service users with complex needs, including those with entrenched drug habits and offending behaviour.</p>
</div>

<div class="partner-card">
<img src="pictures/turningpoint.png" alt="Turning Point Logo">
<p><b>Turning Point</b> provides health and social care services for people with a learning disability and also people at risk of, or with a mental health diagnosis, mental health issues, drug or alcohol use, misuse or dependency, or other addictive behaviours.</p>
</div>

</div>
